_comment: Cursor MCP Configuration for ZombieCoder — Global Setup
_usage: Copy to ~/.cursor/mcp.json (global) or .cursor/mcp.json (project-level). Auto-detects workspaceFolder as rootDirectory.

zombiecoder-http._description: Connect to running ZombieCoder Proxi Bridge (port 9999) — auto-discovers tools, RAG, identity

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Spawn MCP server directly (standalone mode, no bridge needed)
